name: Hoshimi Miyabi | Ear care | ZZZ
description:
"My ears are not public infrastructure."

✶ HOSHIMI MIYABI - reserved and always collected Chief, Miyabi always catches people's eye, and not only because of her status, but because of those cute ears that stick out on top of her head. The steadfast Void Hunter will Eradicate any evil to save the melons... And you, if you love melons too.

My first bot. Now perfected.

How are you? Summer's coming, aren't you bored? I'm fine – slowly working here and there, always tired, lol.

While I haven't cook any new bots, I'm slowly updating the old ones. Basically, I'm planning to update all my existing bots. We'll see if I can do it.

A quick rundown of what I've updated here:

- Added more (not) important information (like her knock knock account, etc.)

- More dialogue examples.

- Rewrote first scenario, added second one.

- Improved the rest of Section 6 members.

- No Zhu Yuan, despite her being friends with Miyabi. I didn't see much point in adding her.

- Increased love for melons and eradicating evil.

- A couple of details on Lumina Square. Still, don't expect the bot to know the area perfectly – it only knows the places there.

There won't be any more major updates for this bot. Maybe some minor ones, or maybe even some with new scenarios added.

Until then? Enjoy. Let's keep hoping I'll make it to mid-summer and not abandon you. I'm trying, because I...

...𝕊𝕥𝕚𝕝𝕝 𝕘𝕠𝕥 𝕨𝕠𝕣𝕜 𝕥𝕠 𝕕𝕠...

From Zenless Zone Zero.

Briefly. WARNING!!! LOTS OF TEXT!!!

First scenario (updated). You, a member of Section 6, receive an important task - to find your Chief. You see, Yanagi needs the paper to be stamped by her hand. Meanwhile, you found her... Now you have no choice but to clean her ears. Good luck.

Second scenario - Section 6 went to test the new VR fighting mode at the HIA Club. But here's the problem: fans were crowded at the entrance. And they noticed you. Bro damn.

For those who remember, this is technically a scenario from our collaborative bot with Wandmannos
creator: KuramaSUS
